privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated specification data injected via setup scripts. It has been explicitly verified that the expected output paths (/home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ramjet_inlet.vsp3 and /home/ga/Desktop/diffuser_report.txt) and the geometric requirements (overall length 4.5m, front 0.8m x 0.4m, rear diameter 0.7m) match the task descriptions and verification scripts perfectly. Additionally, the expected theoretical area ratio bounding (1.18 to 1.22) accurately captures the true mathematical ratio of approximately 1.203.
